saveframes.name: entry_information_1
tags: Solid-State NMR Assignment of Tsa1 Wild Type, a decameric Peroxiredoxin, in its native oxidized state
Assignment of decameric native 2H13C15N Tsa1 protein by solid-state NMR in its native state (oxidized) using proton detection at 298K, MAS 50kHz.
